headline: Brown & Brown (BRO) Stock Looks Undervalued On Fair Value But Rich On Earnings
summary: Brown & Brown stock has fallen sharply over the past year. The Excess Returns intrinsic value estimate points to meaningful undervaluation, while earnings based multiples paint a more expensive picture. This leaves investors with a clear split between what the model implies and what the market is willing to pay. Over the past 12 months, Brown & Brown shares are down 35.0%. This puts recent sentiment at odds with an intrinsic value estimate that indicates the stock may be trading below its...
